items.item: DDU Digital Design Unit, TU Darmstadt
Parses component data (JSON) and outputs individual fields as Grasshopper-native types. Reconstructs geometry, bounding boxes, PCA frames, and metadata from component JSON.
Converts to collection of text fragments
Converts to collection of text fragments
Converts to collection of text fragments
Converts to collection of text fragments
Converts to collection of RGB colours
Converts to collection of three-dimensional points
Converts to collection of three-dimensional axis-systems
Converts to collection of generic geometry
